name: Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine granulated sugar, cornstarch, and salt; mix well. Gradually stir in milk, mixing until smooth. Over medium heat, bring to boiling, stirring constantly; boil 1 minute, stirring. Remove from heat.
2. In a small bowl, lightly beat egg yolks. Stir half of the hot mixture into yolks, mixing well; pour yolk mixture into saucepan. Bring back to boiling, stirring. Cook for 30 seconds longer. Into a medium bowl, pour the hot filling; stir in butter and vanilla. Cover surface with plastic wrap or waxed paper; refrigerate until cold.
3. To assemble: Pour half of the filling into the pie shell. Slice bananas into 1/4-inch-rounds. Arrange banana slices evenly over the filling. Cover with remaining filling.
4. In a medium bowl with a portable electric mixer at medium speed, beat cream and confectioner's sugar until soft peaks form. Spoon whipped cream onto the pie, swirling attractively to cover the surface. Chill well.
